title: Restart Home Network Monitor Service
content:
SSH into monitoring-server

Check status:

sudo systemctl status home-network-monitor

Restart service:

sudo systemctl restart home-network-monitor

Verify:

sudo systemctl status home-network-monitor

View logs:

sudo journalctl -u home-network-monitor -f

title: Internet Outage Troubleshooting Procedure
content:
1. Verify dashboard reports Internet outage.

2. Verify all 3 targets fail:

8.8.8.8
1.1.1.1
9.9.9.9

3. Verify router reachable.

4. Verify modem online.

5. Check Cox service status.

6. Wait for automatic recovery.

title: Cisco Router Interface Troubleshooting
content:
SSH into Cisco Router

show ip interface brief

show interfaces

show running-config

show logging

show version

show users

title: Cisco Switch Port Troubleshooting
content:
show interface status

show interfaces

show logging

show mac address-table

show spanning-tree

show power inline

title: How To Add A New Device To The Dashboard
content:
Dashboard

Add Device

Enter:

Device Name

IP Address

Switch Port

Save

Verify device appears online.

title: OpenMediaVault Shared Drive Troubleshooting
content:
Verify filesystem mounted

Verify Shared Folder

Verify SMB enabled

Verify permissions

Restart SMB:

sudo systemctl restart smbd

Verify access from Mac

title: Ubuntu Server Health Check Commands
content:
Hostname

hostname

IP address

ip a

Disk space

df -h

Memory

free -h

CPU

top

Services

systemctl status

title: Home Network Monitor Backup Procedure
content:
Backup:

config.json

app.py

templates/

static/

logs/

data/

Compress:

tar -czvf home-network-monitor-backup.tar.gz home-network-monitor/

title: Emergency Network Recovery Procedure
content:
Internet Down

1. Verify modem
2. Verify router
3. Verify switch
4. Verify uplink
5. Verify endpoints
6. Verify Internet targets
7. Check Cox outage

title: Home Network Monitor File Locations
content:
Application

~/home-network-monitor

Logs

logs/events.log

Cisco Logs

/var/log/cisco/cisco.log

Knowledge Base

data/knowledge_base.json

Alerts

data/alerts.json

Internet Stats

data/uptime_stats.json

Internet History

data/internet_uptime_history.json

Config

config.json

title: Home Network Monitor - System Upgrade Changelog
content:
Phase 1 - Core Dashboard Foundation
Features Added

✅ Home Network Monitor Dashboard

✅ Network Topology Header

✅ Device Monitoring Engine

✅ Device Status Cards

✅ Event Logging

✅ Network Diagnosis Engine

Purpose

Established the core monitoring system.

Phase 2 - Cisco Monitoring Integration
Features Added

✅ Cisco Router Monitoring

✅ Cisco Switch Monitoring

✅ SNMP Integration

✅ Router Interface Monitoring

✅ Switch Port Monitoring

✅ Cisco Event Logging

Purpose

Added enterprise network device monitoring.

Phase 3 - Alert Center
Features Added

✅ Alert Detection Engine

✅ Critical Alerts

✅ Warning Alerts

✅ Alert History

✅ Alert Acknowledgement

Purpose

Added fault detection.

Phase 4 - Notification Center
Features Added

✅ Voice Alerts

✅ Browser Notifications

✅ SMS Notifications

✅ Alert Recovery Notifications

Purpose

Added notification automation.

Phase 5 - Visual Alert System
Features Added
Phase 5A

✅ Visual Alert Center

✅ Critical Alert Dashboard Banner

✅ Dashboard Alert Highlighting

Phase 5B

✅ Full Screen Critical Alert Popup

Purpose

Improved visibility of critical issues.

Phase 6 - Network Operations Expansion
Features Added

✅ Device Add

✅ Device Edit

✅ Device Remove

✅ Router Monitoring Configuration

✅ Cisco Link Management

Purpose

Added administration capabilities.

Phase 7A - Internet Uptime Tracking Engine
Features Added

✅ Internet Outage Detection

✅ Multi-target Internet Monitoring

8.8.8.8
1.1.1.1
9.9.9.9

Internet outage rule:

Internet outage ONLY if:

8.8.8.8 = DOWN
1.1.1.1 = DOWN
9.9.9.9 = DOWN

Dashboard Statistics:

✅ Internet Uptime

✅ Today's Internet Outages

✅ Longest Internet Outage

✅ Last Internet Outage

Purpose

Added ISP availability monitoring.

Phase 7A.2 - Reset Center
Features Added

✅ Reset Center Page

Reset Buttons:

Reset Internet Uptime Stats

Clear Event Log

Clear Cisco Event Log

Reset Alert History
Purpose

Added maintenance tools.

Phase 7A.3 - Reset Center Add-ons
Features Added

Additional Reset Buttons

System cleanup capabilities

Confirmation dialogs

Purpose

Improved administration.

Phase 7B - Internet Uptime History Log
Features Added

✅ Internet History Page

✅ Recent Internet Outages Dashboard Panel

✅ Internet History Storage

Tracks:

Outage Start

Recovery Time

Duration

Status

Targets Failed
Purpose

Created historical Internet tracking.

Phase 7D - Knowledge Base Edit Articles
Features Added

✅ Create Article

✅ Edit Article

✅ Delete Article

Purpose

Built a self-documenting system.

Phase 7E - Knowledge Base 2.0
Features Added

✅ Search Knowledge Base

✅ Category Filters

Cisco

Linux

OpenMediaVault

Mac

Windows

Network

Dashboard

General

✅ Pinned Articles

✅ Export Knowledge Base

✅ Import Knowledge Base

Purpose

Turned the Knowledge Base into an operational manual.
